name: NVIDIA Container Toolkit for Docker-in-Docker
description: Installs and configures the NVIDIA Container Toolkit so GPU-accelerated containers can run from an inner Docker daemon (Docker-in-Docker)

enable.description: Enable the NVIDIA Container Toolkit feature. When false, the feature is a no-op.

defaultRuntime.description: Set nvidia as the default container runtime for the inner dockerd

restartDockerd.description: Automatically reload the inner dockerd after configuration if it is running
